schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

id.description: Stable, idempotent snapshot identifier. The same logical state produced twice MUST yield the same id (e.g. "<surfaceId>@<revision>"). Consumers use it to deduplicate re-deliveries from APNs and ActivityKit.

surfaceId.description: Identifier for the surface this snapshot updates. One surfaceId is rendered by at most one Live Activity / widget timeline / control / lock-accessory / standby slot at a time. Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 instant the snapshot was authored. Consumers compare against the previously-applied snapshot's updatedAt to drop out-of-order deliveries. UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

progress.description: Completion ratio (0..1). Renders as the activity's progress bar and is what toLiveActivityContentState forwards into ActivityKit.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

modeLabel.description: Compact mode label for the Dynamic Island leading region (e.g. "active").

contextLabel.description: Trailing context tag for the Dynamic Island (e.g. "queue · stage 2").

statusLine.description: One-line status string composed for accessibility readout and for the expanded Lock-Screen layout's secondary row.

actionLabel.description: Label for the activity's primary action button. Omitted when the activity has no action affordance.

stage.description: ActivityKit ContentState stage. Producers transition prompted → inProgress → completing; iOS uses it to decide the Dynamic Island compact layout and the dismissal grace period.

estimatedSeconds.description: Estimated remaining seconds. Optional hint to the Lock-Screen layout for countdown UIs; zero means "unknown".

morePartsCount.description: Number of queued follow-up parts (e.g. "+3 more"). Lets producers signal continuity without padding the payload with the full queue.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

id.description: Stable, idempotent snapshot identifier. The same logical state produced twice MUST yield the same id (e.g. "<surfaceId>@<revision>"). Consumers use it to deduplicate re-deliveries from APNs and ActivityKit.

Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

progress.description: Optional progress fill on system{Small,Medium,Large} widgets that render a progress ring or bar.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

family.description: Preferred widget family. Optional because the host can render at the user-chosen size and ignore the hint.

reloadPolicy.description: WidgetKit timeline reload policy. "manual" means the host reloads only when the App Group write triggers; "afterDate" uses the framework's next-update hint.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

label.description: Button / toggle label rendered in the Control Center tile.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

controlKind.description: Tile behavior. "toggle" exposes a boolean value; "button" runs an App Intent without state; "deepLink" opens the URL.

state.description: Toggle state for "toggle"-kind controls. Absent on "button" / "deepLink". Round-trips through App Group storage when the user toggles.

intent.description: App Intent identifier invoked on tap ("toggle" / "button").

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

id.description: Stable, idempotent snapshot identifier. The same logical state produced twice MUST yield the same id (e.g. "<surfaceId>@<revision>"). Consumers use it to deduplicate re-deliveries from APNs and ActivityKit.

surfaceId.description: Identifier for the surface this snapshot updates. One surfaceId is rendered by at most one Live Activity / widget timeline / control / lock-accessory / standby slot at a time. Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 instant the snapshot was authored. Consumers compare against the previously-applied snapshot's updatedAt to drop out-of-order deliveries. UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

title.description: Notification title. Maps directly to aps.alert.title in the APNs envelope.

subtitle.description: Notification subtitle. Maps to aps.alert.subtitle. Renders between the title and body on iOS 10+.

body.description: Notification body. Maps directly to aps.alert.body.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

category.description: UNNotificationCategory identifier. Selects which set of action buttons the system shows AND - when a UNNotificationContentExtension is registered - decides whether the extension's custom view renders. Maps to aps.category. The set of legal values is the registry in packages/surface-contracts/src/notificationCategories.ts; the schema rejects values not declared there so the wire stays in lockstep with the categories the host registers and the extension Info.plist routes on. Producers intending to route into a content extension SHOULD validate against liveSurfaceNotificationSliceForExtension (category required) instead of the base slice.

threadId.description: Thread identifier for notification grouping. Maps to aps.thread-id.

interruptionLevel.description: iOS aps.interruption-level (iOS 15+). Omitted = system default (active). Use timeSensitive for notifications that must break through Focus modes (e.g. delivery-arrived alerts).

relevanceScore.description: iOS aps.relevance-score (0..1, iOS 15+). Drives ranking inside the grouped-summary Notification Center view. Higher = more prominent.

targetContentId.description: iOS aps.target-content-id. Routes the tap to a specific scene/window identifier the host app advertises via UISceneActivationConditions.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

id.description: Stable, idempotent snapshot identifier. The same logical state produced twice MUST yield the same id (e.g. "<surfaceId>@<revision>"). Consumers use it to deduplicate re-deliveries from APNs and ActivityKit.

surfaceId.description: Identifier for the surface this snapshot updates. One surfaceId is rendered by at most one Live Activity / widget timeline / control / lock-accessory / standby slot at a time. Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 instant the snapshot was authored. Consumers compare against the previously-applied snapshot's updatedAt to drop out-of-order deliveries. UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

title.description: Accessory headline. accessoryCircular ignores it; accessoryRectangular and accessoryInline render it.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

gaugeValue.description: Gauge fill (0..1). Drives the circular ring or rectangular progress; absent means "no gauge."

shortText.description: Compact label. Length-bounded because accessoryInline truncates at ~20 chars; longer strings will be elided by the system.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format generation. Required; producers MUST set this explicitly. Consumers parse against the version they understand; cross-version payloads are upgraded via migrateV4ToV5 (and transitively migrateV3ToV4) inside safeParseAnyVersion before parsing.

id.description: Stable, idempotent snapshot identifier. The same logical state produced twice MUST yield the same id (e.g. "<surfaceId>@<revision>"). Consumers use it to deduplicate re-deliveries from APNs and ActivityKit.

surfaceId.description: Identifier for the surface this snapshot updates. One surfaceId is rendered by at most one Live Activity / widget timeline / control / lock-accessory / standby slot at a time. Maps to the App Group key `surface.snapshot.<surfaceId>` and to the per-kind currentSurfaceId pointer.

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 instant the snapshot was authored. Consumers compare against the previously-applied snapshot's updatedAt to drop out-of-order deliveries. UTC (Z-suffixed) recommended for lexicographic comparison; offsets accepted for producers emitting OffsetDateTime / time.Time / Instant.

state.description: Lifecycle states. queued/active/paused = in-flight; attention = needs user action (drives high-priority APNs); bad_timing = should not interrupt right now; completed = terminal.

progress.description: Standby progress fill. Standby is a passive surface; producers usually mirror the active liveActivity's progress here.

deepLink.description: Tapping the surface opens this URL. Validated as a scheme://… prefix.

presentation.description: "card" for full-color Standby; "night" for low-light red-shifted rendering.

tint.description: Color treatment hint. "monochrome" forces white-on-black for accessibility.
